description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat, expansive layout. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, each with a flat roof, connected by a broad, open courtyard area. Large glass windows and sliding doors are visible along the longer facade, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor integration. The property includes a spacious pool and a paved patio area, suggesting a focus on outdoor living and recreation. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of concrete, glass, and wood, with a neutral color palette dominated by gray and beige tones. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on horizontal lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, a spacious pool, and a minimalist, open layout. The design emphasizes horizontal lines and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long facade with large windows, the main pool, and the two main building volumes.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the main entrance area, the flat roof, and the open courtyard adjacent to the pool.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear facade, secondary building volume, and the pool area.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, showing the secondary structure, pool, and paved patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and large glass doors, emphasizing openness and minimalism.
